signals.headline: UK Labour Minister Emily Thornberry suggested delaying King Charles' spring 2026 DC visit for the US 250th independence
signals.raw: UK Labour Minister Emily Thornberry suggested delaying King Charles' spring 2026 DC visit for the US 250th independence anniversary due to fractured US-UK ties after the Iran war and Trump's criticism of PM Starmer.[1]

signals.headline: Federal judge ruled Trump lacks authority for the ballroom on demolished East Wing site (originally 1902/1942), warning
signals.raw: Federal judge ruled Trump lacks authority for the ballroom on demolished East Wing site (originally 1902/1942), warning of takedown risk; Trump called challengers "Radical Left Lunatics" without confirming appeal.[2]
